## Plugin Submission

**Plugin ID:** `dev.example.my-plugin`
**Category:** theme | renderer | layout | codegen | reverse
**Name:** My Plugin
**Maintainer:** Your Name / GitHub handle

### Checklist

- [ ] `public/plugins/<id>/kuml-plugin.json` added
- [ ] Entry added to `public/plugins/index.json`
- [ ] `kumlVersionRange` is set correctly
- [ ] `licenseSpdx` is set
- [ ] Plugin tested locally with `kuml plugin install <path-to-jar>`
- [ ] Signature public key added (if signing releases)

### Description

<!-- Describe what your plugin does in 2-3 sentences -->
